message:
test: add 14 worker tests and fix two bugs they uncovered

- Add src/worker.test.ts: exercises Worker fetch handler directly via
  constructed Request objects (health, CORS, MCP protocol, draw tool,
  draw_info, error handling, PNG fallback, format coercion)
- Fix CORS preflight on /mcp: OPTIONS was routed to MCP transport which
  returned 405. Move OPTIONS handler before MCP routing.
- Fix upload without WASM: uploadToExcalidraw() crashed when Zig WASM
  not loaded (e.g. Cloudflare Workers). Add fallback chain: WASM →
  Node.js zlib.deflateSync → CompressionStream web API.
